title: receiveCompatibilityCheck is not implemented - compatibility bypass
description: The method receiveCompatibilityCheck() at line 1436 is empty (contains only a TODO comment). When localCompatibilityCheck is true (meaning the remote protocol is not considered compatible), this method is called but does nothing. The server/client proceeds with the connection even when it knows the remote protocol is incompatible.
recommendation: Implement the method to receive the remote spec XML, compare it with the local spec, and throw P7SocketError.localCompatibilityFailed if incompatible.
